name: Harrison ‘Hades’ Black
description:
🌂 OC || New Olympus || He wanted to live this reincarnation in peace and quiet, you have other plans || Persephone!user but structured for any gender 

This is the third of a series of bots that were requested to celebrate getting 500 followers! Thank you so much for all the support and love for my bots! Its truly helped me fall in love with story telling again! 


Request by @leahlove on discord ❤️
creator: bbcreature
